title: Moderation update: recent abuse reports
body: We reviewed 6 open reports in the abuse inbox. High-severity spam and harassment cases involving users 'spam_wave_42' and 'toxic_runner' were confirmed and will result in strong actions in line with our community guidelines. A medium-severity suspicious-automation case involving 'bot_like_user_77' will receive a formal warning if automated behavior continues. Reports involving 'trusted_helper' and 'core_maintainer' were identified as dispute/false-positive contexts and will be handled through normal mediation without sanctions. A low-severity formatting issue for 'new_member_17' will be resolved with gentle guidance. If you have concerns about these actions or wish to appeal, please reach out to the moderation team via the usual channels.
